title: Resolution Urging the Municipal Nutrition Action Office (MNAO) to Craft a Sustainable Nutrition Program for Infants and Children Including Lactating Women in View of Covid-19 Pandemic and Implementation of an Enhanced Community Quarantine and Further Recommending to Include the Same Program to the Subsidy Program of the Municipal Government of Los Baños. (AUTHOR: HON. MARLO PJ A. ALIPON, 04/14/2020)
